name: Deeply Nested Subgraph — Hospital Research Organization
input: Create a flowchart showing a hospital's clinical research organization with deeply nested structure. Top level: University Medical Center. Inside that: Research Division and Clinical Division. Inside Research Division: Basic Science Labs (containing Genomics Lab, Proteomics Lab, Bioinformatics Core) and Translational Research (containing Phase I Unit, Biobank, Animal Facility). Inside Clinical Division: Oncology Trials (containing Solid Tumors, Hematology, Immunotherapy), Cardiology Trials (containing Heart Failure, Arrhythmia), and Neurology Trials (containing Alzheimer's, Parkinson's, Stroke). Show data flow: Genomics Lab --> Phase I Unit --> Solid Tumors. Biobank --> all trial programs. Bioinformatics Core provides analysis to all labs and trials.
qualityCriteria: At least 3 levels of subgraph nesting visible
All top-level divisions present (Research Division, Clinical Division)
Lab nodes present (Genomics Lab, Proteomics Lab, Bioinformatics Core)
Trial program nodes present (Solid Tumors, Hematology, Immunotherapy, Heart Failure)
Cross-division data flow arrows shown (Genomics->Phase I->Solid Tumors)
Biobank connections to multiple trial programs
Valid Mermaid syntax that parses without errors
napkinBenchmark: Flowchart with 3+ levels of nested subgraphs, cross-division arrows, professional hospital org chart appearance.
